scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.db:migrate: cd server && npx prisma generate && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.dev: concurrently -n "api,worker,web" -c "blue,magenta,cyan" --kill-others "npm run start:server" "npm run start:worker" "npm run start:client"
scripts.start: npm run db:up && npm run db:migrate && npm run dev
